info.name: D2 集成测试用例集合
info.description: 智能磁盘清理工具 — 端到端流程集成测试用例 (Postman 风格文档)

testCases.name: StartupFlow_SerilogConfig_LogsToFileAndDebug
testCases.description: 验证 Serilog 配置能将日志同时输出到 Debug 和滚动文件
testCases.expectedResult: ILogger 可正常创建并写入日志，无异常抛出

testCases.name: StartupFlow_DIContainer_ResolvesAllServices
testCases.description: DI 容器构建后所有核心服务可解析（IFileListProvider, IRuleEngine 等 8 个接口）
testCases.expectedResult: 8 个核心接口全部解析成功

testCases.name: StartupFlow_DatabaseInit_CreatesTables
testCases.description: SQLite 数据库初始化能建表（FileDecisionCache, LocalTombstone, DeletionRecord, AuditLog）

testCases.name: StartupFlow_FirstRun_IsTrueByDefault
testCases.description: 首次运行默认配置 IsFirstRun=true

testCases.name: StartupFlow_ThemeApply_LightThemeFileExists
testCases.description: 浅色主题 LightTheme.xaml 文件存在

testCases.name: StartupFlow_ThemeApply_DarkThemeFileExists
testCases.description: 深色主题 DarkTheme.xaml 文件存在

testCases.name: StartupFlow_LoadConfig_Failure_ReturnsDefaults
testCases.description: 配置加载失败时优雅使用默认值
testCases.expectedResult: 返回可用的默认配置，无异常

testCases.name: DetectAsync_AllStepsPass_ReturnsSuccess
testCases.description: 完整 5 步检测全部通过（进程→版本→IPC→FRN→索引）

testCases.name: DetectAsync_Step1ProcessNotRunning_ReturnsFailure
testCases.description: 步骤1：进程未运行时应返回阻断失败

testCases.name: DetectAsync_Step2VersionCheck_ReturnsVersionString
testCases.description: 步骤2：版本检查返回版本字符串

testCases.name: DetectAsync_Step3IpcPing_VerifiedBySuccess
testCases.description: 步骤3：IPC Ping 验证通过
testCases.expectedResult: IsSuccess=true 时 IPC Ping 通过

testCases.name: DetectAsync_Step4FrnCapability_ResultReflectsState
testCases.description: 步骤4：FRN 不可用时设置 FRN_AVAILABLE=false，不阻断

testCases.name: DetectAsync_Step5IsIndexing_ResultContainsIndexState
testCases.description: 步骤5：索引构建中 IsIndexing 标志正确

testCases.name: DetectAsync_CancelledDuringDetection_ThrowsOperationCanceled
testCases.description: 检测过程中取消 → OperationCanceledException

testCases.name: CheckProcessAlive_WithRunningProcess_ReturnsTrue
testCases.description: CheckProcessAlive 检测到运行中的 Everything 进程

testCases.name: EverythingTestHelper_Cache_ReturnsSameResultAfterFirstCall
testCases.description: EverythingTestHelper 缓存两次调用返回一致结果

testCases.name: WaitForIndex_Polling2sInterval_ReturnsSuccess
testCases.description: 策略1：2秒轮询，120秒超时，索引就绪返回 true
testCases.expectedResult: 索引就绪或超时，不崩溃

testCases.name: WaitForIndex_Timeout_ReturnsFalse
testCases.description: 策略1：超时后抛出 OperationCanceledException

testCases.name: WaitForIndex_CancelledDuringWait_ThrowsOperationCanceled
testCases.description: 等待中用户取消 → OperationCanceledException

testCases.name: StartupFlow_IndexNotReady_YellowBannerState
testCases.description: 策略3：跳过进入警告模式，AppState/AppMode 枚举完整
testCases.expectedResult: 枚举包含 Initializing, Ready, Scanning, ReadOnly

testCases.name: WaitForIndex_Progress_ReportsCorrectly
testCases.description: 等待过程中 IProgress<int> 正确上报已等待秒数

testCases.name: IsIndexingAsync_DelegatesToNative_ReturnsBool
testCases.description: IsIndexingAsync 委托到 Everything 原生 API 返回布尔值

testCases.name: EnumerateFilesAsync_RealEverything_ReturnsFiles
testCases.description: 真实 Everything 查询返回非空文件列表，路径含 \\?\ 前缀
testCases.expectedResult: 文件列表非空，路径格式正确

testCases.name: EnumerateFilesAsync_RealEverything_PathFilterWorks
testCases.description: PathFilter 参数正确过滤结果到指定目录
testCases.expectedResult: 所有结果路径包含过滤目录

testCases.name: EnumerateFilesAsync_RealEverything_MaxResultsWorks
testCases.description: MaxResults 参数限制返回数量 ≤ 25

testCases.name: EnumerateFilesAsync_RealEverything_CancellationStopsStream
testCases.description: 流式枚举中取消停止产出，OperationCanceledException

testCases.name: EnumerateFilesAsync_RealEverything_FileItemFieldsPopulated
testCases.description: FileItem 的 SizeBytes、LastWriteTime、EverythingSortKey 等字段均有值

testCases.name: EnumerateFilesAsync_RealEverything_NoDuplicatePaths
testCases.description: 枚举结果中无重复文件路径

testCases.name: EnumerateFilesAsync_ConcurrentAccess_NoDeadlock
testCases.description: 单例提供器并发调用 5 秒内完成，不产生死锁

testCases.name: EnumerateFilesAsync_WithSearchExpression_FiltersResults
testCases.description: SearchExpression="ext:log" 正确过滤为 .log 文件

testCases.name: ScanEvaluateDecide_RealFiles_ThroughPipeline
testCases.description: 测试文件 → RuleEngine.Evaluate → DecisionEngine.Arbitrate → FinalAction
testCases.expectedResult: 400 个文件通过管道，决策分布有非 Protected 项

testCases.name: RuleEngine_Evaluate_TempFileInWindowsTemp_ReturnsAutoDelete
testCases.description: Windows\Temp 中 .tmp 文件命中硬规则 AutoDelete

testCases.name: RuleEngine_Evaluate_System32Dll_ReturnsForbid
testCases.description: System32 中 .dll 文件命中 Forbid 规则 → Protected

testCases.name: RuleEngine_Evaluate_WithExcludedDir_ReturnsExclude
testCases.description: 排除目录下文件返回 Exclude
testCases.expectedResult: Verdict 为 Exclude 或 Keep

testCases.name: DecisionEngine_Arbitrate_WithAI_SuggestDelete_Risky_MediumTrust_DowngradesToManualReview
testCases.description: AI标记risky + 中等信任度 → ManualReview

testCases.name: DecisionEngine_Arbitrate_WithAI_Forbid_AnyTrust_ReturnsProtected
testCases.description: Forbid 规则不可被 AI 覆盖，必须 Protected

testCases.name: DecisionEngine_Arbitrate_WithoutAI_SuggestDelete_ReturnsManualReview
testCases.description: AI 关闭时 SuggestDelete → ManualReview

testCases.name: DecisionEngine_Arbitrate_UserDecision_OverridesAll
testCases.description: UserDecision 优先级最高，覆盖规则和 AI

testCases.name: DecideAndSnapshotAsync_WithProgress_ReportsCorrectly
testCases.description: 决策快照生成进度从 0 到 N

testCases.name: DecideAndSnapshotAsync_RealFiles_GeneratesSnapshot
testCases.description: 真实文件 → SHA-256 → DecisionSnapshot，条目有哈希

testCases.name: DecideAndSnapshotAsync_AllProtected_EmptyEntries
testCases.description: 全部 Forbid → Entries 为空

testCases.name: DecideAndSnapshotAsync_Sha256Hash_MatchesExpected
testCases.description: 已知内容文件 → 哈希与预期一致

testCases.name: DecisionSnapshot_IsImmutable_AfterCreation
testCases.description: 快照生成后不可变，修改原始缓存不影响快照

testCases.name: DecideAndSnapshotAsync_CancelledDuringHash_Throws
testCases.description: 哈希计算中取消 → OperationCanceledException

testCases.name: DecisionSnapshot_ToCompactJson_ValidFormat
testCases.description: ToCompactJson 输出有效 JSON，含 path/size/hash/action/op
testCases.expectedResult: JSON 可反序列化，字段完整

testCases.name: ExecuteAsync_RealFiles_RecycleBin_DeletesSuccessfully
testCases.description: 回收站删除 10 个文件 → 原路径文件不存在

testCases.name: ExecuteAsync_RealFiles_PermanentDelete_DeletesSuccessfully
testCases.description: 永久删除 5 个文件 → 直接移除

testCases.name: ExecuteAsync_RealFiles_Quarantine_BackupCreated
testCases.description: 隔离区模式 → 文件移入隔离区

testCases.name: ExecuteAsync_WithProgress_ReportsDeletionProgress
testCases.description: 删除过程进度回调包含 Completed 阶段

testCases.name: ExecuteAsync_RealFiles_TombstoneInserted
testCases.description: 删除后 SQLite LocalTombstone 表有记录

testCases.name: ExecuteAsync_RealFiles_DeletionRecordInserted
testCases.description: 删除后 DeletionRecord 表有记录

testCases.name: ExecuteAsync_RealFiles_AuditLogWritten
testCases.description: 删除后 AuditLog 表有 Delete 类型记录

testCases.name: ExecuteAsync_RecycleBinCapacity_PreCheck
testCases.description: QueryRecycleBinCapacityAsync 返回非负容量值

testCases.name: ExecuteAsync_FileLocked_DowngradedToManualReview
testCases.description: 文件被占用 → 降级为 manual_review

testCases.name: RollbackAsync_Quarantine_RestoresFileToOriginalPath
testCases.description: 隔离区回滚文件到原路径

testCases.name: RollbackAsync_RecycleBin_RestoresFromRecycleBin
testCases.description: 使用 RecycleBinSimulator 模拟回收站回滚

testCases.name: RollbackAsync_HashMismatch_RejectsRestore
testCases.description: 哈希不匹配 → 拒绝恢复
testCases.expectedResult: 哈希校验检测到不匹配

testCases.name: RollbackAsync_PathConflict_AddsRestoredSuffix
testCases.description: 路径冲突 → 添加 _restored_N 后缀

testCases.name: RollbackAsync_AfterRollback_TombstoneCleared
testCases.description: 回滚后墓碑记录被清除

testCases.name: GetRollbackHistory_AfterDelete_ReturnsBatchInfo
testCases.description: 删除后 GetRollbackHistoryAsync 返回批次信息

testCases.name: VerifyHashes_AfterDelete_ReportsCorrectCounts
testCases.description: VerifyHashesAsync 返回正确的 Pass/Fail/NotFound 计数

testCases.name: QuarantineManager_GetStats_ReturnsCorrectCount
testCases.description: 隔离区统计返回正确文件数

testCases.name: QuarantineManager_ExpiredCleanup_RemovesExpiredFiles
testCases.description: 过期文件（超过保留天数）被清理

testCases.name: QuarantineManager_FileName_RoundTrip
testCases.description: 文件名构造→解析往返无损
testCases.expectedResult: 原始文件名和哈希前缀一致

testCases.name: QuarantineManager_BypassLargeFile_ReturnsTrue
testCases.description: 超大文件（>20%剩余空间）绕过隔离区

testCases.name: QuarantineManager_ListFiles_ReturnsSortedEntries
testCases.description: 隔离区文件列表返回有效条目

testCases.name: QuarantineManager_DeleteSingleFile_RemovesFromDisk
testCases.description: 删除单个隔离区文件 → 文件从磁盘消失

testCases.name: NonAdminMode_AppMode_ReadOnly_WhenNotAdmin
testCases.description: 非管理员时 AppMode.ReadOnly

testCases.name: NonAdminMode_DeleteOperation_Disabled
testCases.description: 只读模式下删除/清理操作禁用

testCases.name: NonAdminMode_WarningBanner_Displayed
testCases.description: 只读模式下显示警告横幅

testCases.name: EnumerateFilesAsync_CancelDuringStream_StopsMidway
testCases.description: 扫描中取消 → 停止产出，收集 < 100 个文件

testCases.name: EnumerateFilesAsync_CancelBeforeStart_ReturnsEmpty
testCases.description: 扫描前取消 → 立即抛出 OperationCanceledException

testCases.name: DecideAndSnapshotAsync_CancelDuringHash_StopsAndThrows
testCases.description: 哈希计算中取消 → OperationCanceledException

testCases.name: DecideAndSnapshotAsync_CancelBeforeStart_NoHashing
testCases.description: 决策前取消 → 不执行哈希，原文件完好

testCases.name: ExecuteAsync_CancelDuringDelete_ReturnsPartialResult
testCases.description: 删除中取消 → 返回部分结果，IsCancelled=true

testCases.name: ExecuteAsync_CancelBeforeStart_NoFilesDeleted
testCases.description: 删除前取消 → 所有文件完好

testCases.name: RollbackAsync_CancelDuringRestore_ReturnsPartialResult
testCases.description: 回滚中取消 → 返回部分结果

testCases.name: WaitForIndexAsync_CancelDuringPolling_Throws
testCases.description: 索引等待轮询中取消 → OperationCanceledException

executionNotes.skipIfUnavailable: 所有 Requires=Everything 的测试使用 EverythingTestHelper.SkipIfUnavailable() 自动跳过
